typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	var_viha_input_file_name as string (),
	var_viha_input_folder as string ()
}

source(output(
		ORDER_ID as double,
		ENCOUNTER_ID as double,
		PERSON_ID as double,
		MRN as string,
		PATIENT_NAME_LAST as string,
		PATIENT_NAME_FIRST as string,
		PATIENT_NAME_MIDDLE as string,
		PATIENT_PHN as string,
		PATIENT_BIRTH_DT_TM as date,
		PATIENT_GENDER as string,
		PATIENT_CITY as string,
		PATIENT_POSTAL_CODE as string,
		PATIENT_PROVINCE as string,
		PATIENT_COUNTRY as string,
		ORDERING_PROVIDER_ID as double,
		ORDERING_PROVIDER_MSP as string,

		ORDERING_PROVIDER_NAME_LAST as string,

		ORDERING_PROVIDER_NAME_MIDDLE as string,
		ORDERING_PROVIDER_HOSPITAL as double,
		ORDERING_PROVIDER_CITY as string,
		ORDERING_PROVIDER_POSTAL_CODE as string,
		ORDERING_PROVIDER_PROVINCE as string,

		COPY_TO_PROVIDER_1_NAME_LAST as string,
		COPY_TO_PROVIDER_1_NAME_FIRST as string,
		COPY_TO_PROVIDER_1_NAME_MIDDLE as string,
		COPY_TO_PROVIDER_1_CITY as string,
		COPY_TO_PROVIDER_1_POSTAL_CODE as string,
		COPY_TO_PROVIDER_1_PROVINCE as string,
		COPY_TO_PROVIDER_1_COUNTRY as string,
		COPY_TO_PROVIDER_2_ID as double,
		COPY_TO_PROVIDER_2_MSP as string,
		COPY_TO_PROVIDER_2_CPSID as string,
		COPY_TO_PROVIDER_2_NAME_LAST as string,
		COPY_TO_PROVIDER_2_NAME_FIRST as string,
		COPY_TO_PROVIDER_2_NAME_MIDDLE as string,
		COPY_TO_PROVIDER_2_CITY as string,
		COPY_TO_PROVIDER_2_POSTAL_CODE as string,
		COPY_TO_PROVIDER_2_PROVINCE as string,

		COPY_TO_PROVIDER_3_NAME_FIRST as string,

		COPY_TO_PROVIDER_3_CITY as string,
		COPY_TO_PROVIDER_3_POSTAL_CODE as string,

		UPDT_DT_TM as date,
		C_EVENT_ID as double,
		C_VALID_FROM_DT_TM as date,
		C_VALID_UNTIL_DT_TM as date,
		C_UPDT_DT_TM as date,
		C_SEQUENCE_NBR as double,
		C_NOMENCLATURE_ID as double,
		C_NOMENCLATURE_SOURCE_STRING as string,

		S_UNIT_OF_MEASURE_DISPLAY as string,
		ORDERING_PROVIDER_HOSPITAL_CODE as string,
		ORDERING_PROVIDER_HOSPITAL_NAME as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false) ~> TXTFileSourceformonthlyextract
TXTFileSourceformonthlyextract derive(input_file_name = $User__var_viha_input_file_name,
		input_file_datetime = $System__StartTime,
		input_file_folder = $User__var_viha_input_folder) ~> DerivedColumn
DerivedColumn derive({Copy of input_file_folder} = toString(input_file_folder),
		{Copy of input_file_name} = toString(input_file_name)) ~> DataConversion
DataConversion sink(input(
		collection_dt_tm as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		input_file_name as string,
		copy_to_provider_3_cpsid as string,
		copy_to_provider_2_country as string,
		result_long_text as string,
		copy_to_provider_2_id as integer,
		copy_to_provider_2_msp as string,
		credit_flag as string,
		test_cd as integer,
		clinical_event_id as integer,
		accession_id as integer,
		result_dt_tm as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		order_item_name as string,
		updt_dt_tm as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		ordering_provider_name_middle as string,
		c_result_display as string,
		copy_to_provider_1_name_first as string,

		careset_order_id as integer,

		input_file_folder as string,

		c_event_id as integer,
		patient_phn as string,
		c_nomenclature_source_string as string,
		ordering_provider_name_last as string,
		mrn as string,
		c_valid_until_dt_tm as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		ordering_provider_hospital as integer,
		receive_dt_tm as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		event_id as integer,
		copy_to_provider_3_id as integer,

		copy_to_provider_1_id as integer,
		accession_number as string,
		copy_to_provider_2_name_middle as string,
		copy_to_provider_2_city as string,
		s_string_result_format_display as string,
		patient_city as string,
		copy_to_provider_1_name_middle as string,
		test_name as string,
		ordering_provider_province as string,
		patient_postal_code as string,
		ordering_provider_country as string,
		result_full_description as string,
		s_string_result_format_cd as integer,

		result_lab_location_name as string

	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		collection_dt_tm = COLLECTION_DT_TM,
		input_file_name = {Copy of input_file_name},
		copy_to_provider_3_cpsid = COPY_TO_PROVIDER_3_CPSID,
		copy_to_provider_2_country = COPY_TO_PROVIDER_2_COUNTRY,

		result_dt_tm = RESULT_DT_TM,

		updt_dt_tm = UPDT_DT_TM,
		ordering_provider_name_middle = ORDERING_PROVIDER_NAME_MIDDLE,
		c_result_display = C_RESULT_DISPLAY,
		copy_to_provider_1_name_first = COPY_TO_PROVIDER_1_NAME_FIRST,

		copy_to_provider_2_cpsid = COPY_TO_PROVIDER_2_CPSID,
